keyword: best wifi pet camera no subscription
title: Best Wi-Fi Pet Camera With No Subscription (Local-Only Picks)
meta: Pet cameras that work without a monthly cloud fee — local SD storage and free apps that don't trap you in a subscription.
intro: Most pet cameras nickel-and-dime you with cloud subscriptions. These models record to a local SD card or your NAS and never bill you again.

sections.body: The 'free' cloud tiers expire or cap clips to a few seconds. Local storage gives you full clips forever for the price of a microSD card.
You trade off off-site backup — if a burglar steals the camera, the footage goes with it. For pet-checking that's fine.
A free app can still be buggy. Read recent reviews for the specific model's app stability before buying.

faq.a: Yes — motion/person alerts over the app are usually free; only cloud clip history costs.
Local-only means it never leaves your network. Strongest privacy option.
